simple_types.name: Integer_16
simple_types.code: type Integer_16 is range -2 ** 15 .. 2 ** 15 - 1 with Size => 16;

simple_types.name: Integer_32
simple_types.code: type Integer_32 is range -2 ** 31 .. 2 ** 31 - 1 with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: Integer_8
simple_types.code: type Integer_8 is range -2 ** 7 .. 2 ** 7 - 1 with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: Word_16
simple_types.code: type Word_16 is mod 2 ** 16 with Size => 16;

simple_types.name: Word_32
simple_types.code: type Word_32 is mod 2 ** 32 with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: Word_8
simple_types.code: type Word_8 is mod 2 ** 8 with Size => 8;
